Home Projects Demos About Contact

Projects

9 projects

  • Healthcare RAG LLM System

    Spark NLP · LangChain · Haystack · LLMs · Databricks

    End-to-end RAG pipeline for healthcare document question-answering, integrating vector stores and parameter-optimized retrieval.

    Demo write-up →

  • Medical Multi-Modal Chatbot

    Visual Language Models · LangChain · Docker · REST APIs

    Conversational medical assistant capable of processing both text and image inputs (clinical notes, scans) via a containerized API stack.

  • Handwritten Medication Extraction

    Visual LMs · OCR (Tesseract) · Streamlit · Docker · Databricks

    Automated extraction of handwritten prescriptions and medication orders, combining visual language models with OCR post-processing.

  • Healthcare NLP Suite

    Spark NLP · TensorFlow · BERT · Streamlit

    Full suite of clinical NLP models covering NER, text classification, assertion status detection, entity resolution, relation extraction, de-identification, summarization, and Q&A.

  • LLM Document Q&A System

    Open-source LLMs · Python · LangChain

    Open-source question-answering system over custom document collections using open-source LLMs.

    Source →

  • Brain Tumor Multi-Classification

    TensorFlow · CNN · Streamlit · Flask

    Deep learning model for multi-class brain tumor detection from MRI scans with an interactive web interface.

  • Mask Detection (YOLOv5)

    YOLOv5 · Python · Computer Vision

    Real-time face mask detection system using YOLOv5 object detection.

  • Stock Price Prediction

    Bi-LSTM · RNN · Streamlit · Flask

    Time-series forecasting for stock prices using bidirectional LSTM networks with an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

  • Arduino Arm-Car Robot

    C · Arduino · Android

    Remotely controlled robotic arm-car system built with Arduino and controlled via Android application.
